Bash(cd E:/stock_predicition/backend && python -c "
from app.core.database import SessionLocal
from app.models.models import Alert
from datetime import date, timedelta

db = SessionLocal\(\)
try:
    # Test query
    start_date = date.today\(\) - timedelta\(days=30\)
    alerts = db.query\(Alert\).filter\(Alert.triggered_at >= start_date\).all\(\)
    print\(f'Found {len\(alerts\)} alerts'\)
    
    # Check if alerts table exists and has data
    count = db.query\(Alert\).count\(\)
    print\(f'Total alerts in database: {count}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
finally:
    db.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd E:/stock_predicition/backend && python -c "
import requests
import json

# Test alerts list endpoint
try:
    response = requests.get\('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/alerts?page=1&page_size=20'\)
    print\(f'GET /api/v1/alerts - Status: {response.status_code}'\)
    if response.status_code == 200:
        data = response.json\(\)
        print\(f'Total alerts: {data.get\(\\"total\\", 0\)}'\)
        print\(f'Returned: {len\(data.get\(\\"data\\", []\)\)} alerts'\)
    else:
        print\(f'Error: {response.text}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Request failed: {e}'\)

print\(\)

# Test alerts stats endpoint
try:
    response = requests.get\('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/alerts/stats?days=30'\)
    print\(f'GET /api/v1/alerts/stats - Status: {response.status_code}'\)
    if response.status_code == 200:
        data = response.json\(\)
        print\(f'Stats: {json.dumps\(data.get\(\\"data\\", {}\), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'Error: {response.text}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Request failed: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd E:/stock_predicition/backend && python -c "
import requests

# Test unread alerts for Dashboard
print\('Testing Dashboard unread alerts...'\)
response = requests.get\('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/alerts', params={'is_read': 0, 'page_size': 5}\)
data = response.json\(\)
print\(f'Status: {response.status_code}'\)
print\(f'Unread alerts: {data.get\(\\"total\\", 0\)}'\)

print\(\)

# Test stats for last 7 days
print\('Testing 7-day stats...'\)
response = requests.get\('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/alerts/stats', params={'days': 7}\)
data = response.json\(\)
print\(f'Status: {response.status_code}'\)
stats = data.get\('data', {}\)
print\(f'7-day total: {stats.get\(\\"total\\", 0\)}'\)
print\(f'7-day unread: {stats.get\(\\"unread\\", 0\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/stock_predicition" && python -u -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('阎付浩然 河北金融学院2025届毕业论文开题报告.docx'\)
for i, para in enumerate\(doc.paragraphs\):
    text = para.text.strip\(\)
    if text:
        print\(f'[{i}] {text}'\)
for i, table in enumerate\(doc.tables\):
    print\(f'\\n=== TABLE {i} ==='\)
    for j, row in enumerate\(table.rows\):
        cells = [cell.text.strip\(\) for cell in row.cells]
        print\(f'Row {j}: {\\" | \\".join\(cells\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
